why_it_matters: Pharmacist involvement supports the medication review due on arrival and medication-management goals central to this admission, so its documentation completes the care-team plan.
This is an admission note for a multi-week SNF stay, so a completed hospital discharge procedure is not pertinent to documenting this visit.
Setting realistic expectations that neuropathy and vision may but might not fully improve informs patient understanding and prevents false reassurance affecting adherence.
Documenting the immediate physician and nursing follow-up establishes the care timeline and accountability for this newly admitted patient.
Given the tearfulness, bereavement, and isolation driving this admission, documenting emotional support and reframing the stay is central to the psychosocial care plan.
